-**I am looking for a full time job!** If you think we would be a good match, please reach out. Previously, I was a Student Researcher at [Google Research](http
s://research.google/), an ML Research Intern at [Apple Health AI](https://machinelearning.apple.com/work-with-us) and a data scientist and the second full-time
employee at [HealthRhythms](https://www.healthrhythms.com).
\ No newline at end of file
